## Author Checklist

- [ ] File is named `YYYY-MM-DD-[slug].md` under `src/social/`
- [ ] `publication-date` uses RFC 3339 format with timezone offset (e.g. `2026-04-01T09:00:00-07:00`)
- [ ] `platform` is set to `linkedin`
- [ ] All tagged users include both `name` and `url` fields
- [ ] Post length is appropriate for LinkedIn (recommended: 150–300 words)
- [ ] Hashtags are included at the end of the post body
